name: NAC Nueva Alcántara
address: Urb. Nueva Alcántara, San Pedro Alcántara, Marbella 29670
description: NAC Nueva Alcántara is Marbella's largest padel complex, featuring 16 state-of-the-art courts spread across indoor and outdoor facilities. With professional coaching staff, a well-stocked pro shop, and a lively social scene, NAC is the go-to venue for players of all levels. The club regularly hosts regional tournaments and is home to several competitive leagues throughout the year.

name: Puente Romano Padel
address: Bulevar Príncipe Alfonso von Hohenlohe, s/n, 29602 Marbella
description: Set within the legendary Puente Romano Beach Resort, this exclusive padel club offers eight premium outdoor courts surrounded by lush Mediterranean gardens. The world-class facilities attract professional players and celebrities alike, making it one of the most prestigious places to play padel on the Costa del Sol. Expert coaches and personalized programs are available for all skill levels.

name: Real Club Padel Marbella
description: Real Club Padel Marbella is one of the oldest and most respected padel clubs in the area, boasting ten outdoor courts with premium artificial grass surfaces. The club has a strong community spirit with weekly social tournaments, ladies' leagues, and junior development programs. Its central location and excellent facilities make it the perfect base for regular players and visiting enthusiasts alike.

name: Manolo Santana Racquets Club
description: Named after Spain's legendary tennis champion, Manolo Santana Racquets Club is a premier sports complex in the heart of Nueva Andalucía's Golf Valley. The club's twelve padel courts — both indoor and outdoor — are complemented by a vibrant social atmosphere, regular coaching clinics, and a professional tournament calendar. Its proximity to Puerto Banús makes it a favorite among the area's international community.

name: Los Monteros Racket Club
address: Urb. Los Monteros, Crta. N-340, Km 187, 29603 Marbella
description: Los Monteros Racket Club offers eight well-maintained outdoor padel courts in a relaxed beachside setting east of Marbella town. The club is popular with local residents and hotel guests from the nearby Los Monteros resort. Friendly staff, competitive court rates, and a laid-back atmosphere make this a great choice for casual games and friendly matches.

name: Padel Pro Puerto Banús
address: Av. de Julio Iglesias, Puerto Banús, 29660 Marbella
description: Padel Pro Puerto Banús is the most conveniently located club for visitors staying in or near the famous marina district. Its six outdoor courts are meticulously maintained, and the club attracts an international crowd from the surrounding luxury hotels and apartments. Evening bookings are especially popular, with a vibrant post-game social scene at the on-site bar.

name: Villa Padierna Palace Padel
address: Crta. de Cádiz, Km 166, 29679 Benahavís, Estepona
description: Villa Padierna Palace offers an unrivalled padel experience within the grounds of one of Europe's finest luxury resorts. Six immaculate outdoor courts provide a stunning backdrop of rolling hills and manicured gardens. The resort's five-star service extends to the padel facilities, with private coaching lessons, equipment hire, and post-game spa treatments available.

name: San Pedro Padel Club
address: C. Río Verde, San Pedro Alcántara, 29670 Marbella
description: San Pedro Padel Club is a friendly neighbourhood club offering some of the most affordable court time in the Marbella area. Its seven outdoor courts serve a loyal community of local players, with active weekday leagues and weekend social tournaments. The welcoming atmosphere makes it an ideal spot for beginners taking their first steps in the sport.

name: Estepona Padel Center
description: Estepona Padel Center is the area's premier indoor padel facility, providing nine fully covered courts that allow year-round play regardless of weather conditions. The modern complex opened in 2022 and quickly became the hub for padel in the western Costa del Sol. High-quality lighting, climate control, and a professional coaching academy make it a top choice for serious players.
